name: WellSky Home Health & Hospice API
what_it_does: WellSky REST API for post-acute and home-based care management platform. Enables AI agents to manage patient referral intake and episode management, access clinical documentation and care plans, retrieve OASIS and outcome measure data, handle Medicare and Medicaid billing, manage scheduling and visit verification, integrate with payer authorization systems, access quality reporting analytics, and connect home health data across the post-acute care continuum.
use_cases: Managing home health patient intake and referral workflows from care coordination agents
Accessing clinical documentation and OASIS data from quality reporting agents
Processing Medicare home health billing from revenue cycle agents
Scheduling visits and verifying completion from field operations agents
not_for: Acute hospital care without home-based care workflows
Primary care without post-acute continuum integration
Facility-based care without home health episode management
best_when: A home health agency, hospice, or post-acute provider using WellSky wants AI agents to automate intake, scheduling, clinical documentation quality, billing, and outcome reporting.
avoid_when: HIPAA: Home health patient PHI including clinical assessment data is protected. BAA required. OASIS and Medicare billing automation requires clinical and compliance oversight.

auth.notes: WellSky uses OAuth 2.0 and API key for API access. Agency-level credentials with clinical and billing data scopes. FHIR-based interoperability for health system integrations. Partner program for technology integrations. Former Kinnser Software (acquired 2018).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — post-acute care enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Overland Park, Kansas. Formed 2019 by rebranding of TPG-backed merger of Healtheon and Kinnser Software. Major home health and hospice EHR. Used by 2,000+ agencies. Previously Kinnser for home health, Healtheon for hospice. Competes with Netsmart and Axxess.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; enterprise SLA

known_agent_gotchas: HIPAA: Home health patient PHI — BAA required for all agent access
No public MCP server — OAuth2 and API key with partner program
No webhooks — polling required for clinical updates and visit completions
OASIS submission is federally mandated — accuracy critical for Medicare reimbursement
Medicare home health billing has strict episode management rules
Platform rebranding from Kinnser — legacy documentation may reference old product name
agent_readiness.security_notes: Home health patient PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required. Medicare billing compliance mandatory.

security_score_components.security_notes: Home health PHI. HIPAA, SOC2, ONC. OAuth2 + API key. US data residency. BAA required.
